title: My new interpretation of Asukas last line
display_title: My new interpretation of Asukas last line
wikitext:
[]: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Sat Sep 19, 2015 11:14 am Yes, this has been discussed to death, and yes, this is just a fanwank , but just wanted to add my two cents -- and no this isn't about the 'I feel sick' or 'How disgusting' debate; both are applicable in my interpretation. As we know (this does need citation perhaps) Anno originally had her say something along the lines of "I'll never let you kill me" to Shinji, but Anno and Asuka's VA came to the conclusion of "Kimochi warui" after discussion about a rape scenario. BUT of more important note, i s that we don't see Asuka get tanged - nor explicitly killed for that matter. It is implied to some. HOWEVER, the wide shot of Eva 02 being devoured by the MPs is possibly symbolism that Kyoko and EVA 02 finally 'die'. Yes, it sounds far fetched - after all we do see EVA02 being ripped to shreds etc etc - so why not Asuka? We see everyone else's (who actually dies b4 tang) death explicitly. Kawrou's head falls off. Ritsuko is shot by Gendo. Misato dies from a wound. The last of Asuka we actually see is her arm being torn in half... To sum up... she might not have died from the MPs. Which leads in to my next point. She is able to be tanged, and thus joins instrumentality for a while . Fanwank again, I'm going off the assumption that those who actually are killed beforehand (Misato etc) aren't able to be resurrected because their souls no longer exist anyway. It is during instrumentality that Asuka, again, gets mind 'raped' - in a sense that all thoughts and feelings become one, others are able to see the vulnerable, hidden side of her. Of course we aren't shown this in EoE, but EoTV does explore this to an extent. Of course, given the chance, Asuka would want to end this -- hence she is the first one to reappear beside Shinji after he rejects instrumentality. She has never wanted to 'share' -- a bath with Misato and Shinji, or even her Unit 02 in Magma Diver when Rei II offers to pilot it. I believe the "Kimochi warui" is from Asuka's first hand experience of instrumentality, albeit a short time. She feels sick because she was exposed and because she did not share the humiliating experience with Shinji (who we all assume is the one she desired to be with most). Not because of the horrible sight, not because Shinji jerked over her, not because Shinji was strangling her. Again, with the rape concept penned by Anno to Asuka's VA, we never actually see Asuka's state of mind during instrumentality in EoE - possibly implying that Shinji did not connect or 'rape' her during it -- but he did jack off to her beforehand . After all, he holds Misato's pendant (but he can't communicate with her because she died beforehand), talks to 'Rei', sees his mother -- but what about Asuka? Isn't she an important woman in Shinji's life too? Perhaps Asuka was expecting Shinji to interact with her during instrumentality, but he didn't? Hence the 'how disgusting' being a result of her perception of Shijni's changing attitude towards her (judging by the coffee scene [in a metaphorical sense]) and also not interacting with her during instrumentality and then later strangling her. And yes, even though she claims to not have feelings throughout the series and whatnot, I think it's safe to assume she does. But wouldn't she rather 'die' than be with Shinji? Wasn't she suicidal? My explanation is that her suicidal tendencies were shifted when she realized Kyoko was with her in EVA 02 all along. The 'come die with me Asuka' that Asuka supposedly hears is probably a distorted memory (?), or was merely a sign of Kyoko's mental ilness, but not the true Kyoko talking. I'm assuming Kyoko wanted Asuka to go on living, as Yui did Shinji- hence the activation of berserk. Interesting to note that both souls of the mothers served some kind of purpose in protecting their child / fulfilling their child's wishes, but share the same fate - they cease to be afterwards. Shinji does question his mother as to what her fate is in the sea of LCL, but we get no definite response - so, again, I'm fan-wanking that she leaves Unit 01 and goes to oblivion now that she has helped Shinji fulfill his wish.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2015 11:39 am In DC 22', Asuka's sickened at the thought of sharing the same bath/air/space as Shinji and Misato, so yeah, Instrumentality (Well, all souls merging) being disgusting to her is IMO one of the many reasons she said "I feel sick" in the final scene.

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Sep 19, 2015 2:18 pm Maya Ibuki wrote: Fanwank again, I'm going off the assumption that those who actually are killed beforehand (Misato etc) aren't able to be resurrected because their souls no longer exist anyway.

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Sat Sep 19, 2015 2:50 pm NemZ wrote: That's a problem when Misato, Ritsuko and Asuka all have a conversation with Shinji before 3rd impact goes off.

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 19, 2015 2:59 pm Maya Ibuki wrote: I thought that was metaphorical? Does it actually take place?

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Sat Sep 19, 2015 3:18 pm Reichu wrote: Shinji is seeing part of Misato's week-long college sexathon with Kaji. We only know about that because Ritsuko mentions it in #21, but Shinji would have no way of knowing, aside from being in her head.

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sat Sep 19, 2015 3:23 pm Maya Ibuki wrote: But... considering that EoTV and EoE may be two different continuities... does Shinji still explore Misato in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE » Sat Sep 19, 2015 4:53 pm 1731298478 wrote: he draft has this after Asuka wakes up in Unit-02: 吐き気をもよおすアスカ。 アスカ（口元を押さえて）「気持ち悪い・・・薬が切れたんだわ・・・どうでもいいや・・・もう」 Asuka feels nauseous. Asuka (putting her hand over her mouth): Kimochi warui... the medication has run out.. I don't care.. anymore.

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Sep 19, 2015 5:39 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: That's debatable, with no definitive answer

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Sep 22, 2015 11:04 am Maya Ibuki wrote: BUT of more important note, i s that we don't see Asuka get tanged - nor explicitly killed for that matter. It is implied to some. HOWEVER, the wide shot of Eva 02 being devoured by the MPs is possibly symbolism that Kyoko and EVA 02 finally 'die'. Yes, it sounds far fetched - after all we do see EVA02 being ripped to shreds etc etc - so why not Asuka? We see everyone else's (who actually dies b4 tang) death explicitly. Kawrou's head falls off. Ritsuko is shot by Gendo. Misato dies from a wound. The last of Asuka we actually see is her arm being torn in half... To sum up... she might not have died from the MPs.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Sep 22, 2015 3:23 pm Yeah, as much as it pains me to say it, there's really no way Asuka survived long enough to be turned into LCL. There's no sign of the core or entry plug in Unit 02's remains, and even if she ejected somehow, the plug would have been obliterated in the blast that exposed the Geofront. Good thing Rei can bend the rules!

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Sep 22, 2015 4:43 pm Bagheera wrote: IOW we didn't see her get tanged because there was nothing left of her to tang.

[]: Re: My (new?) interpretation of Asuka's last line.             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Sep 22, 2015 4:55 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I always liked to think that the walls of the Entry Plug turned orange at that point. But then, I forget what the implications were for hanging after death, and why it may or may not be possible. Does NGE ever explain where pre 3I souls of the deceased go? Because we see a fair amount of dead character show up in Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Sep 22, 2015 5:01 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Good thing Rei can bend the rules!

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Sep 22, 2015 5:06 pm Reichu wrote: Kind of odd that there's no sign of the core or plug in the film. (Even when Eva-02's solar plexus was clearly exposed, they forgot to draw the core there. Somehow. :p ) The core along with the attached tube-shaped plug receptacle would form a pretty bulky unit. Damage from the Spear aside, I don't imagine the harpies would have fussed with it. When they ripped Kyoko's corpse apart off-screen, they probably just discarded the "entry system" as inedible scrap.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Sep 22, 2015 5:13 pm EDIT: Ah, found the (old-ass) edit I made where I indicate where the core goes (and corrected some weird mispaints): SPOILER: Show
